Intensive English Program with Rowan University by Doğuş University

Doğuş University offers its students a special Intensive English Program (ELP) in cooperation with Rowan University, one of the well-established public universities in the USA (New Jersey). During the 4-week intensive program, students develop their skills in Listening & Speaking, Reading & Vocabulary, and Grammar & Writing, while advancing their language level through courses focusing on academic English, vocabulary, pronunciation, and presentation skills. On-campus accommodation is provided throughout the program, and upon completion, participants receive a certificate directly issued by Rowan University. Held in Glassboro, New Jersey, this experience offers a unique opportunity for students who wish to improve their language skills while enjoying an unforgettable study-abroad experience.

For more detailed information, the website

https://www.rowan.edu/

may be visited.
